response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile engineer with deep experience in web, distributed systems, and low-latency backend work, but the role demands current, hands-on C++/STL expertise for industrial automation. His documented C++ work is minimal and dates to a brief 2007-2008 stint at National Instruments plus a thesis project; his systems-level strengths are in DLang and Node.js/TypeScript. There is no evidence of MQTT, IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle practice, industrial protocols, or Azure, all of which are central or advantageous for this position.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Sociomantic
Event-driven architecture and platform-building experience via GISCollective and microservices work
Strong quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, mentoring and workshop leadership
concerns: Very limited and outdated professional C++ experience for a C++-centric role
No industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443, or SDL exposure mentioned
No IoT/MQTT, industrial protocol, or Azure experience; recent focus is web/AI tooling

key_factors.factor: No IEC 62443 / secure-SDL or industrial domain background
Strong concurrent, networked, event-driven systems engineering
